content.text: Now let me also sync the OpenClaw config repo and check for other important program directories to back up.

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git -C . rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null && git -C . remote -v 2>/dev/null || echo "not a git repo"

# Check for other project repos that should be synced
for dir in /Users/landonking/.agents /Users/landonking/Projects/*; do
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    echo "GIT: $dir"
    cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5
  fi
done 2>/dev/null

# Check .agents and other notable directories
for dir in /Users/landonking/.agents; do
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    echo "GIT: $dir"
    cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5
    cd "$dir" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null | head -2
  elif [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    echo "NOT GIT: $dir"
  fi
done
